allow: PowerShell($gh = "C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe"; & $gh auth status; Write-Output "---"; & $gh api user --jq .login; Write-Output "---git---"; git config --global user.name; git config --global user.email)

PowerShell($paths = @\("$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\GitHub CLI\\hosts.yml", "$env:APPDATA\\GitHub CLI\\hosts.yml", "$env:USERPROFILE\\.config\\gh\\hosts.yml"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $p"; Get-Content $p } else { Write-Output "missing: $p" } }; Write-Output "---env---"; "GH_TOKEN set: $\([bool]$env:GH_TOKEN\)"; "GITHUB_TOKEN set: $\([bool]$env:GITHUB_TOKEN\)")
